preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v Austin FC: Arena urges his side to give everything in final push
preReview.description: The San Jose Earthquakes must beat Austin FC on decision day and hope both Real Salt Lake and the Colorado Rapids lose to make the playoffs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes vs. Austin FC: Arena insta a su equipo a darlo todo en el último empuje
preReview.description: Los San Jose Earthquakes deben vencer a Austin FC en el día decisivo y esperar que tanto Real Salt Lake como Colorado Rapids pierdan para clasificar a los playoffs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes vs Austin FC: Arena incita i suoi a dare tutto nell'ultimo sforzo
preReview.description: I San Jose Earthquakes devono battere l'Austin FC nell'ultima giornata e sperare che sia il Real Salt Lake che i Colorado Rapids perdano per qualificarsi ai playoff.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes x Austin FC: Arena pede máximo esforço ao time em reta final
preReview.description: O San Jose Earthquakes deve vencer o Austin FC no dia de decisão e torcer para que tanto o Real Salt Lake quanto o Colorado Rapids percam para chegar aos playoffs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes v Austin FC : Arena exhorte son équipe à tout donner pour le dernier effort
preReview.description: Les San Jose Earthquakes doivent battre Austin FC lors de la journée décisive et espérer que le Real Salt Lake et les Colorado Rapids perdent pour se qualifier pour les play-offs.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes gegen Austin FC: Arena fordert sein Team auf, alles im letzten Push zu geben
preReview.description: Die San Jose Earthquakes müssen am Entscheidungstag Austin FC schlagen und darauf hoffen, dass sowohl Real Salt Lake als auch die Colorado Rapids verlieren, um die Playoffs zu erreichen.

preReview.title: سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس ضد أوستن إف سي: أرينا يحث فريقه على تقديم كل ما لديهم في الدفع النهائي
preReview.description: يجب على سان خوسيه إيرثكويكس الفوز على أوستن إف سي في اليوم الحاسم وتأمل أن يخسر كل من ريال سالت ليك وكولورادو رابيدز لتسجيل دخولهم إلى الأدوار الإقصائية.

preReview.title: San Jose Earthquakes x Austin FC: Arena incentiva sua equipe a dar tudo no esforço final
preReview.description: O San Jose Earthquakes precisa vencer o Austin FC no último dia e torcer para que tanto o Real Salt Lake quanto o Colorado Rapids percam para se classificar para os playoffs.

QAData.question: Who won between San Jose Earthquakes and Austin FC on Sun, 19 Oct 2025 01:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Jose Earthquakes won 2–1 over Austin FC on Sun, 19 Oct 2025 01:00:00 GMT.
